name: node-read
title: node-read
summary: Read user input from stdin module for Node.js
description:
Read user input from stdin module for Node.js
node-read extends Node.js readline.question builtin method with options
like silent input, replaced input, timeout or default value.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.

When validating lab setup, run `node-read --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
